summary: Tested B2C checkout flow improvements: (1) Certifications filter removed from /fabrics, (2) GST mandatory with red asterisk on checkout, (3) Free Delivery card removed, (4) Credit balance lookup by GSTIN, (5) Apply for Credit CTA with >₹2 Cr disclaimer. All backend tests PASSED (8/8). All frontend tests PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: GST verification via Sandbox API returns 'Invalid GSTIN pattern' for most test GSTINs - this is expected behavior per main agent note. Credit lookup only triggers after successful GST verification, which is correct for production (credit lines map to verified businesses).
seed_data_creation: Created credit wallet for GST 27AABCW1234T1Z5 with ₹500,000 balance via credit application approval flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: B2C checkout flow improvements verified: (1) Certifications filter removed from FabricsPage - other filters (category, type, pattern, color, width, composition) still work, cert badges still show on cards, (2) GST Number field has required attribute and red asterisk, form submission blocked without GST, (3) Free Delivery/Logistics included green card removed from checkout, Logistics line still shows in Payment Summary, (4) Credit balance lookup by GSTIN works - GET /api/credit/balance?gst_number=<gstin> returns has_credit=true when wallet exists, (5) Apply for Credit CTA shows when no wallet exists with >₹2 Cr disclaimer, modal opens with prefilled data, (6) PUT /api/credit/applications/{id}/approve stores gst_number on credit_wallets doc.

certifications_filter_removed.details: data-testid=filter-certifications NOT found in DOM, no 'Certifications' label in filter panel, other filters (category, type, pattern, color, width, composition) still work

cert_badges_on_cards.details: Found 7 certification badge elements on fabric cards (data-testid^='card-cert-')

gst_mandatory_checkout.details: GST Number label has red asterisk (text-red-500), input has required attribute, form submission blocked with error 'GST Number is required (15 characters)'

free_delivery_card_removed.details: 'Free Delivery' and 'Logistics included' text NOT found on checkout page

logistics_in_payment_summary.details: Logistics line found in Payment Summary (₹2,900.00 for 100m bulk order), Packaging line also present (₹100.00)

credit_balance_by_gst_api.details: GET /api/credit/balance?gst_number=<gstin> returns has_credit=true when wallet exists, has_credit=false (200) when none exists, 400 when neither email nor gst_number supplied

credit_approve_stores_gst.details: PUT /api/credit/applications/{id}/approve stores gst_number on credit_wallets doc - verified via balance lookup by GST

apply_credit_cta.details: When no wallet exists for GSTIN: shows dashed 'Apply for Credit' card (data-testid=apply-credit-cta) with >₹2 Cr disclaimer

apply_credit_modal.details: Clicking 'Apply for Credit →' (data-testid=apply-credit-btn) opens modal (data-testid=credit-apply-modal) with prefilled name/email/phone/GST, turnover dropdown required

credit_balance_display.details: When wallet exists for verified GSTIN: shows 'Pay via Locofast Credit' radio (data-testid=pay-credit-option) with available balance (₹500,000) and company name

mocked_apis.note: GST verification via Sandbox API returns 'Invalid GSTIN pattern' for test GSTINs - this is expected. For frontend testing, intercepted GST verify API to return valid=true to test credit balance display flow.
